Video.title: Video
Video.description: Information about a video uploaded to the platform.

description.description: A short description of the video.

url.description: The URL to the video file.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL to the video's thumbnail image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the video was uploaded.

authorId.description: UID of the user who uploaded the video.

authorName.description: Display name of the user who uploaded the video.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

isOnline.description: Whether the user is currently online.

lastActive.description: Timestamp of the user's last activity.

sessionStart.description: Timestamp of when the user's current session started.

Playlist.title: Playlist
Playlist.description: A collection of videos curated by a user.

description.description: A short description of the playlist.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL to the playlist's thumbnail image.

videoIds.description: List of video IDs in the playlist.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the playlist was created.

authorId.description: UID of the user who created the playlist.

AppSettings.title: AppSettings
AppSettings.description: Global application settings like name, logo, and details.

appLogo.description: The URL to the application's logo.

updatedBy.description: UID of the admin who last updated the settings.

/videos/{videoId}.description: Collection of videos available on the platform.

/users/{userId}/mylist/{videoId}.description: Subcollection of videos saved by the user.

/users/{userId}/savedPlaylists/{playlist.description: Subcollection of playlists saved by the user.

/users/{userId}/history/{videoId}.description: Subcollection of videos watched by the user with timestamps and playback progress.
